package sample

import "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"

func SmallErrorPayloads(c *gin.Context, kind string) {
	if kind == "" {
		c.JSON(400, gin.H{"error": "missing kind"})
		return
	}

	if kind == "bad" {
		c.JSON(400, gin.H{"error": "bad kind"})
		return
	}

	if kind == "timeout" {
		c.JSON(504, gin.H{"error": "timeout"})
		return
	}

	c.JSON(200, gin.H{"ok": true})
}
